parameters.name: list_calendars
parameters.description: List all available calendars on the CalDAV server. Returns calendar names and IDs.

parameters.name: list_events
parameters.description: List events from a calendar. Optionally filter by date range. Parameters: calendar (calendar ID from list_calendars), start (optional, ISO 8601 date like 2026-03-14T00:00:00Z), end (optional, ISO 8601 date)

parameters.name: create_event
parameters.description: Create a new calendar event. Parameters: calendar (calendar ID), title (event title), start (ISO 8601 datetime), end (ISO 8601 datetime), description (optional), location (optional)

parameters.name: update_event
parameters.description: Update an existing calendar event. Fetches the event first, merges changes, and saves. Parameters: calendar (calendar ID), event_uid (UID from list_events), title (optional), start (optional, ISO 8601), end (optional, ISO 8601), description (optional), location (optional)

parameters.name: delete_event
parameters.description: Delete a calendar event. Parameters: calendar (calendar ID), event_uid (UID from list_events)
